mapper.insert: INSERT INTO red_packet (user_code, total_amount, total_count, remain_amount, remain_count, type, status, expire_time, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userCode}, #{totalAmount}, #{totalCount}, #{remainAmount}, #{remainCount}, #{type}, #{status}, #{expireTime}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update:
UPDATE red_packet
remain_count = #{remainCount}, remain_amount = #{remainAmount}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND remain_count > 0
